items.title: Modder creates a Grand Theft Auto multiverse, opening portals within GTA San Andreas that make GTA 3 and Vice City completely playable
items.summary: Seems like Doctor Strange took a trip through Rockstar's history

items.title: Claims about GTA 6 pre-orders are incorrect and "absurd", analyst firm says, but it's still had the "strongest pre-order campaign ever recorded"
items.summary: We all knew that GTA 6 was going to be big, but new data from a video game market data analyst group suggests Rockstar's upcoming sandbox game has already earned in excess of $260m for the company. Read more

items.title: "It's not that we don't care about PC" - Former Rockstar developer suggests why GTA 6 is only coming to consoles at launch
items.summary: GTA 6 is looming like that monolith in 2001: A Space Odyssey, casting its fearsome shadow over the games industry and probably also scaring some monkeys. But PC players won't be able to join in the fun when Rockstar Games ' mega-sequel launches on 19th November, and former studio producer John Ricchio - who worked o…
